tldr: Dorian Godon broke through after his early-week ITT win, taking the Orbe circuit stage from a reduced bunch with the Col du Mollendruz as the day's defining climb.

narrative.headline: Godon back to the line
narrative.body: 176.6 km hilly circuit around Orbe with the cat-2 Col du Mollendruz in the closing 65 km. Reduced-bunch sprint into the line; Godon took INEOS's second stage of the week.
